settings.text: Fall asleep faster and wake up fully rested
Less joint pain and morning stiffness
Calmer mood and lower daily stress
400 TC organic cotton, the softest and strongest grounding sheet
Machine washable and built to last

settings.title: Description
settings.content:
Experience deeper sleep, less pain, and calmer mornings, all from the comfort of your bed. Terra Therapy's grounding sheets are woven with 400 thread count organic cotton and 10% pure silver fiber to deliver a safe, comfortable, and effective grounding connection every night.

Plug into any grounded outlet and let Earth's natural electrons flow through the sheet to support your body's recovery, from better sleep and reduced inflammation to calmer nervous system function.

No EMFs. No batteries. Just effortless, science-backed healing while you sleep.

settings.title: Who is it for?
settings.content:
Grounding can support you if you're:

  • Struggling with poor sleep, racing thoughts, or insomnia
  • Waking up stiff, sore, or fatigued
  • Living with chronic pain, inflammation, or autoimmune issues
  • Experiencing anxiety, stress, or hormonal imbalance
  • Looking for a natural, non-invasive wellness solution

settings.title: Shipping and returns
settings.content:
• Free U.S. shipping on orders over $100
  • Fast delivery: 2–6 days (U.S. & Canada), 7–10 days (EU & international)
  • 90-Day Money-Back Guarantee: Try it risk-free. If you don't feel the benefits, send it back. No questions asked.
  • Returns: Contact our support team for easy return instructions. Products must be in good condition.
  • Support: Our team is available 24/7 to help with ordering, setup, or troubleshooting.

settings.title: Care Instructions
settings.content:
To maintain conductivity and extend the life of your grounding sheet:

  • Wash on gentle cycle with mild detergent
  • Avoid bleach, fabric softeners, or dryer sheets
  • Air dry when possible, or tumble dry on low
  • Do not dry clean
  • Wash regularly to remove body oils that can affect performance

We include full care instructions in the box, and our customer team is always available if you need help.

settings.short_description: Reduce inflammation, improve sleep, and calm your nervous system all while you sleep or relax, safely grounded at home.

settings.title: Neurological & Mental Health
settings.description: Grounding helps calm and stabilize the nervous system, supporting those dealing with:
settings.bullets: Migraines & headaches|Neuropathy & brain fog|Anxiety, depression & mood swings|ADHD & focus issues|Insomnia & disrupted sleep

settings.title: Musculoskeletal Pain & Inflammation
settings.description: By reducing chronic inflammation, grounding can offer relief from:
settings.bullets: Arthritis (RA & OA)|Fibromyalgia|Joint, back & neck pain|Chronic fatigue syndrome|Post-exercise soreness

settings.title: Cardiovascular & Circulatory Health
settings.description: Grounding supports healthy blood flow and thermal regulation. Ideal for those managing:
settings.bullets: Poor circulation|High blood pressure|Swollen legs & feet|Varicose veins|Cold extremities

settings.title: Immune & Inflammatory Conditions
settings.description: By calming the body's inflammatory response, grounding may support conditions like:
settings.bullets: Autoimmune flare-ups (Lupus, MS, RA)|Allergies & asthma|Inflammation-related skin issues

settings.title: Hormonal & Metabolic Balance
settings.description: Grounding helps support hormone and metabolic regulation. Particularly helpful for:
settings.bullets: Menopause & perimenopause|PCOS & irregular cycles|Thyroid imbalance|Insulin resistance & blood sugar issues

settings.title: Specialized Support
settings.description: A daily grounding practice can also support:
settings.bullets: Injury & post-surgery recovery|Pregnancy support (with doctor approval)|Jet lag & circadian disruption|Skin health (eczema, psoriasis)|Athletic performance & muscle recovery

settings.heading: One Natural Solution. Whole-Body Benefits.
settings.subheading: Grounding supports every major system in your body, helping relieve chronic symptoms, restore balance, and promote long-term wellness. Backed by 20+ years of research and thousands of customer results.
settings.cta_text: Explore the science behind these benefits

settings.name: Sleeping Pills
settings.how_it_works: Sedate the brain with sleep-inducing chemicals
settings.what_to_consider: Tolerance builds, grogginess, not long-term safe

settings.name: Pain Meds
settings.what_to_consider: Doesn't treat root cause, side effects common
settings.side_effects: Risk of addiction or long-term damage

settings.name: Supplements
settings.how_it_works: Target isolated symptoms like melatonin or blue light
settings.what_to_consider: Vary in effectiveness, often don't address the root

settings.heading: Why We Are Really Different
